message: Hi, I placed an order 5 days ago and still haven't received any tracking info. Order #BL10234.
My package was supposed to arrive yesterday but it still hasn't come. Delivery is very late!
I want a refund for my order. The product was damaged when it arrived and I'm very disappointed.
